name: MakeAPayment
description: Customer wants to make a payment on their account right now — including paying their regular bill, clearing an overdue balance, making a partial payment, or settling a final bill. They are ready to pay and want to know how. This is not about setting up a payment method, changing payment dates, or requesting a payment extension because they can't afford to pay.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to make a payment
How do I pay my bill?
I need to pay my {paymentType}
Can I make a payment right now?
Pay my {paymentType} please
I want to pay off my {paymentType}
How can I pay my bill over the chat?
I'd like to clear my {paymentType} today
Can I pay online?
What's the best way to pay my bill?
I want to pay the {paymentType} on my account
Take a payment from me please
I need to settle my {paymentType} before my services get restricted
Can I pay part of my bill now and the rest later?
I want to pay my {paymentType} so my account is up to date
How much do I need to pay to clear my balance?
I've got the money now and want to make a {paymentType}
Can you take a payment over the phone?
I want to pay my {paymentType} — can I do it here?
I need to pay before the deadline
What payment methods do you accept?
make a payment
